---
name: Bug Report
about: Something in a template or documentation is wrong or misleading
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## What Is Wrong

Describe what the template, command, or documentation says and why it is incorrect.

## Steps To Reproduce

1. Which template or file is affected (include the path)
2. What you tried
3. What happened
4. What you expected instead

## Environment

- OS: <!-- e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04 -->
- `gh --version`:
- `gh aw --version` (if relevant):

## Additional Context

Paste any error output or screenshots here.
